creator: admin@maxnet.ua
text:
Hi!

   We have problem with Adaptect RAID controller ASR8405/ASR8805 with latest firmware. When OS booting, system panics in late boot after Run_interrupt_driven_hooks: still waiting after 300 seconds for xpt_config. With the card removed boots normally. replaced the card thinking it was faulty same message. 

   Last time solution for us we used driver 3.3.2-52013 with FreeBSD 10.3 from site, but for FreeBSD 11.1 no driver :( 
Do you planned fix this is bug, the same case:https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=209468


   This is bug have too FreeBSD 10.2, 10.3, 10.4-RC, 11.0 :(
